footer.description: Ishirahamwe ry'abahinga mu vy'ubuhinga ngurukanabumenyi rifise icicaro i Sarajevo muri Bosnie. Twubaka software zisanzwe, AI / ML solutions, cloud architecture, hamwe na automation systems.

header.description: Uhereye ku iterambere rya software y'ubucuruzi hamwe n'ubwenge bw'ubucuruzi bukoreshwa na AI gushika ku bikorwa remezo vy'igicu hamwe n'inyishu za IoT - dutanga serivisi zuzuye z'ubuhinga zituma habaho guhanga udushya no kwihutisha iterambere.
header.trustedBy: Kwizera amashirahamwe aharanira agateka ka zina muntu
